markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff for the Cresta \<\> GrowthX content partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/y2r6xTRH-4L4yR6aPLy5umuDoaXS5sZe?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Goal:** Build a scalable content engine for traditional SEO and AEO to support Cresta's triple-digit growth and market expansion.](https://fathom.video/share/y2r6xTRH-4L4yR6aPLy5umuDoaXS5sZe?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)
  - [**Focus:** Content for broad discoverability (e.g., competitive comparisons, glossaries), not deep technical product content, which remains an internal function.](https://fathom.video/share/y2r6xTRH-4L4yR6aPLy5umuDoaXS5sZe?tab=summary&timestamp=2851.0)
  - [**Value Prop:** Cresta's unique value is its deep partnership model (forward-deployed PMs/engineers) and end-to-end platform, not just the business outcomes it delivers.](https://fathom.video/share/y2r6xTRH-4L4yR6aPLy5umuDoaXS5sZe?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
  - [**Blockers:** Key sales objections include Cresta's higher price vs. bundled solutions, a "build vs. buy" mindset for AI agents, and missing out-of-the-box integrations.](https://fathom.video/share/y2r6xTRH-4L4yR6aPLy5umuDoaXS5sZe?tab=summary&timestamp=2267.0)

## Topics

### Why Now? The Need for Scalable Content

  - [**Company Growth:** Cresta is growing triple-digits annually and expanding from large enterprise (Fortune 500/100) into mid-market (500+ employees) and new regions (APAC, EMEA).](https://fathom.video/share/y2r6xTRH-4L4yR6aPLy5umuDoaXS5sZe?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)
  - [**Channel Shift:** AEO (AI Engine Optimization) is a critical new channel, already driving 8–20% of pipeline from ChatGPT, but without a formal strategy or measurement.](https://fathom.video/share/y2r6xTRH-4L4yR6aPLy5umuDoaXS5sZe?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)
  - [**Team Bottleneck:** The small marketing team lacks the capacity and specialized expertise (SEO/AEO) to produce content at the required scale.](https://fathom.video/share/y2r6xTRH-4L4yR6aPLy5umuDoaXS5sZe?tab=summary&timestamp=3081.0)

### Cresta's Value Proposition

  - [**Business Outcomes:**](https://fathom.video/share/y2r6xTRH-4L4yR6aPLy5umuDoaXS5sZe?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)
      - [**Grow Revenue:** Improve conversion in sales and service-to-sales motions.](https://fathom.video/share/y2r6xTRH-4L4yR6aPLy5umuDoaXS5sZe?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)
      - [**Save Money:** Increase operational efficiency via agent assist and AI automation.](https://fathom.video/share/y2r6xTRH-4L4yR6aPLy5umuDoaXS5sZe?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)
      - [**Differentiate CX:** Enable personalized, proactive experiences and better VoC insights.](https://fathom.video/share/y2r6xTRH-4L4yR6aPLy5umuDoaXS5sZe?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)
  - [**Customer Perception (The "Why Cresta"):**](https://fathom.video/share/y2r6xTRH-4L4yR6aPLy5umuDoaXS5sZe?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
      - [**Exceptional Partnership:** Deeply understands customer KPIs and provides forward-deployed PMs/engineers to ensure measurable ROI.](https://fathom.video/share/y2r6xTRH-4L4yR6aPLy5umuDoaXS5sZe?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
      - [**End-to-End Platform:** A single partner for the entire AI CX journey, from agent augmentation to full automation.](https://fathom.video/share/y2r6xTRH-4L4yR6aPLy5umuDoaXS5sZe?tab=summary&timestamp=1072.0)

### Customer Profile & Trigger Moments

  - [**Ideal Customer Profile (ICP):**](https://fathom.video/share/y2r6xTRH-4L4yR6aPLy5umuDoaXS5sZe?tab=summary&timestamp=1515.0)
      - [**Verticals:** Financial Services, Healthcare (payer), Telco, Travel, Retail, Home Services.](https://fathom.video/share/y2r6xTRH-4L4yR6aPLy5umuDoaXS5sZe?tab=summary&timestamp=1515.0)
      - [**Size:** Historically 5k+ employees, now expanding to 250+ employees.](https://fathom.video/share/y2r6xTRH-4L4yR6aPLy5umuDoaXS5sZe?tab=summary&timestamp=1640.0)
      - [**Use Cases:** High-volume contact centers for sales, customer care, service-to-sale, churn retention, and collections.](https://fathom.video/share/y2r6xTRH-4L4yR6aPLy5umuDoaXS5sZe?tab=summary&timestamp=1575.0)
  - [**Trigger Moments:**](https://fathom.video/share/y2r6xTRH-4L4yR6aPLy5umuDoaXS5sZe?tab=summary&timestamp=1762.0)
      - [**"Do More with Less":** A primary driver, covering both cost-cutting and managing rapid growth without hiring.](https://fathom.video/share/y2r6xTRH-4L4yR6aPLy5umuDoaXS5sZe?tab=summary&timestamp=1971.0)
      - [**Executive Mandate:** CIOs/CEOs are tasked with implementing AI and seek proven solutions.](https://fathom.video/share/y2r6xTRH-4L4yR6aPLy5umuDoaXS5sZe?tab=summary&timestamp=1762.0)
      - [**Digital Transformation:** Leaders need to integrate customer data across digital channels.](https://fathom.video/share/y2r6xTRH-4L4yR6aPLy5umuDoaXS5sZe?tab=summary&timestamp=1877.0)
      - [**VoC Bottleneck:** Manual analysis of conversations is too slow to drive business decisions.](https://fathom.video/share/y2r6xTRH-4L4yR6aPLy5umuDoaXS5sZe?tab=summary&timestamp=1905.0)

### Sales Objections & Competitive Landscape

  - [**Primary Objections:**](https://fathom.video/share/y2r6xTRH-4L4yR6aPLy5umuDoaXS5sZe?tab=summary&timestamp=2267.0)
      - [**Price:** Cresta is more expensive than bundled, less-specialized solutions from incumbents (e.g., Genesys).](https://fathom.video/share/y2r6xTRH-4L4yR6aPLy5umuDoaXS5sZe?tab=summary&timestamp=2500.0)
      - [**"Build vs. Buy":** Prospects question the value of a vendor vs. building an AI agent in-house.](https://fathom.video/share/y2r6xTRH-4L4yR6aPLy5umuDoaXS5sZe?tab=summary&timestamp=2572.0)
      - [**Integrations:** Missing out-of-the-box support for platforms like Zendesk Chat, TalkDesk, and Nextiva.](https://fathom.video/share/y2r6xTRH-4L4yR6aPLy5umuDoaXS5sZe?tab=summary&timestamp=2439.0)
  - [**Competitive Landscape:**](https://fathom.video/share/y2r6xTRH-4L4yR6aPLy5umuDoaXS5sZe?tab=summary&timestamp=2331.0)
      - [**Incumbents:** Genesys, Nice, Variant, Nexidia offer bundled, less mature features.](https://fathom.video/share/y2r6xTRH-4L4yR6aPLy5umuDoaXS5sZe?tab=summary&timestamp=2166.0)
      - [**AI Agent Specialists:** Sierra, Decagon.](https://fathom.video/share/y2r6xTRH-4L4yR6aPLy5umuDoaXS5sZe?tab=summary&timestamp=2378.0)
      - [**Dev Tools:** Bland, Vapi (Cresta is not a self-service SDK).](https://fathom.video/share/y2r6xTRH-4L4yR6aPLy5umuDoaXS5sZe?tab=summary&timestamp=2390.0)

### Content Strategy & Process

  - [**Current Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/y2r6xTRH-4L4yR6aPLy5umuDoaXS5sZe?tab=summary&timestamp=2646.0)
      - [Content is driven by a 6–8 week product release schedule.](https://fathom.video/share/y2r6xTRH-4L4yR6aPLy5umuDoaXS5sZe?tab=summary&timestamp=2670.0)
      - [Hyper-technical content is written by Product/Engineering, with Content providing editorial polish.](https://fathom.video/share/y2r6xTRH-4L4yR6aPLy5umuDoaXS5sZe?tab=summary&timestamp=2692.0)
      - [Other content (webinars, e-books) is created by the Content Lead.](https://fathom.video/share/y2r6xTRH-4L4yR6aPLy5umuDoaXS5sZe?tab=summary&timestamp=2731.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Role:**](https://fathom.video/share/y2r6xTRH-4L4yR6aPLy5umuDoaXS5sZe?tab=summary&timestamp=2862.0)
      - [**Focus:** Broadly discoverable content for SEO/AEO.](https://fathom.video/share/y2r6xTRH-4L4yR6aPLy5umuDoaXS5sZe?tab=summary&timestamp=2862.0)
      - [**Examples:** Competitive comparison pages, sitemap glossaries, and general educational content.](https://fathom.video/share/y2r6xTRH-4L4yR6aPLy5umuDoaXS5sZe?tab=summary&timestamp=2907.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This avoids the deep product nuance that slows down external teams and leverages Cresta's internal expertise for technical content.](https://fathom.video/share/y2r6xTRH-4L4yR6aPLy5umuDoaXS5sZe?tab=summary&timestamp=2851.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/y2r6xTRH-4L4yR6aPLy5umuDoaXS5sZe?tab=summary&timestamp=3153.0)
      - [Deliver initial artifacts (writing guidelines, personas, company context) for review by EOW 1.](https://fathom.video/share/y2r6xTRH-4L4yR6aPLy5umuDoaXS5sZe?tab=summary&timestamp=3153.0)
      - [Develop a full content strategy (TAM analysis, topic clusters, prioritized list) for review by EOW 2.](https://fathom.video/share/y2r6xTRH-4L4yR6aPLy5umuDoaXS5sZe?tab=summary&timestamp=3188.0)
      - [Set up the AI visibility tracking tool this week.](https://fathom.video/share/y2r6xTRH-4L4yR6aPLy5umuDoaXS5sZe?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)
  - [**Cresta:**](https://fathom.video/share/y2r6xTRH-4L4yR6aPLy5umuDoaXS5sZe?tab=summary&timestamp=3153.0)
      - [Provide feedback on all artifacts and the content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/y2r6xTRH-4L4yR6aPLy5umuDoaXS5sZe?tab=summary&timestamp=3153.0)
      - [Share additional resources as needed to support research.](https://fathom.video/share/y2r6xTRH-4L4yR6aPLy5umuDoaXS5sZe?tab=summary&timestamp=3390.0)
